landing.heroDesc: Submit claims, coordinate investigations, and respond to digital misinformation — rapidly, credibly, and as a team.
landing.step1Desc: Report a suspicious claim with source links and context.
landing.step2Desc: Analysts verify claims with evidence, coordinated in teams.
landing.step3Desc: Publish findings rapidly — verified, debunked, or escalated.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your misinformation response operations

claims.title: Claims
claims.noComments: No comments yet. Start the discussion.
claims.claimTitlePlaceholder: Enter a clear, factual title for the claim
claims.descriptionPlaceholder: Provide details, context, and why this claim needs investigation
claims.demoNotice: This form is pre-filled with a demo claim for your first submission.

sbunker.title: Sbunker Disinfo Feed
sbunker.subtitle: Latest disinformation coverage from Sbunker.org by Metamorphosis Foundation
sbunker.searchPlaceholder: Search articles by title, excerpt, or author...
sbunker.noArticles: No articles fetched yet. Click Refresh or wait for next scheduled crawl.
sbunker.attribution: Content sourced from Sbunker.org — © Metamorphosis Foundation. All rights reserved.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Detect and track coordinated disinformation campaigns
campaigns.createDesc: Group related claims into a coordinated disinformation campaign.
campaigns.noClaims: No claims linked to this campaign yet.
campaigns.notesPlaceholder: Add investigation notes, patterns, or observations...
campaigns.name: Campaign Name
campaigns.similarDesc: Claims with overlapping topics detected. Consider grouping them.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Manage user registrations, roles, and system settings
admin.noPending: No pending registrations. All caught up!
admin.userApprovedDesc: The user has been approved and notified.
admin.userRejectedDesc: The user has been rejected and notified.

auth.magicLinkSent: We sent a magic link to
auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox and click the link
auth.checkSpam: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
auth.signUpNote: New accounts require admin approval before access is granted.
auth.pendingDesc: Your account is awaiting approval from an administrator. You'll receive an email once your account has been reviewed.
auth.pendingEmailNote: We'll notify you by email when your account is approved.
auth.rejectedDesc: Your account registration has been rejected. Please contact info@disbunk.org for more information.
auth.suspendedDesc: Your account has been suspended. Please contact info@disbunk.org for assistance.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Let's get you started with a quick tour of the platform.
onboarding.step1Desc: Try submitting your first claim. We've pre-filled a demo for you.
onboarding.step2Desc: Attach evidence to support or debunk a claim — screenshots, documents, or links.
onboarding.step3Desc: Teams coordinate investigations. Join one or create your own.

evidence.title: Evidence Vault
evidence.subtitle: {{count}} evidence items across all claims
evidence.uploadDesc: Attach a file to a claim — screenshots, documents, archives, or social media captures.
evidence.searchPlaceholder: Search evidence by title or tag...
evidence.noResults: No evidence found matching your filters.

common.footer: This web page is produced as part of the Hackathon activity under the CIVICUS Digital Democracy Initiative (DDI), implemented by Metamorphosis Foundation in partnership with Civic Literacy Initiative.
